skills.confidenceTrend: Confidence scores are very low (0.05-0.10), indicating insufficient data quality or grounding signals
skills.groundingImprovement: Grounding score doubled between runs (0.15 to 0.3), showing improving data quality
skills.recommendationConsistency: Price recommendations consistently low (1 per run) while product rankings stable at 8
skills.bundleVariability: Bundle suggestions fluctuate (3-4), showing moderate exploration of combinations
skills.sessionVolume: Very low traffic (4 sessions/day) limiting statistical significance of all recommendations

pricingInsights.note: Insufficient transaction data to generate confident pricing strategies
pricingInsights.strategy: Conservative - only high-confidence price changes are suggested

productInsights.rankingStability: high - consistent 8 product rankings across runs
productInsights.viewTrackingGap: No product view data captured in daily trends
productInsights.bundleOpportunities: 3-4 bundles identified but with low confidence backing

thingsToAvoid: Acting on price recommendations until confidence score exceeds 0.5
Making major bundle changes based on current low-confidence suggestions
Drawing weekly conclusions without sufficient weekly data accumulation
Trusting recommendations while session volume remains below statistical threshold
Ignoring the empty productViews and pageViews tracking gap
Over-relying on single-day trend snapshots for strategic decisions
Making aggressive pricing decisions while confidence remains below 0.3
Over-relying on bundle suggestions until grounding score stabilizes above 0.5
Drawing conclusions from limited session data (only 4 daily sessions)
Ignoring the low calculated confidence baseline of 0.3
Expanding product ranking scope before improving data grounding
skills.lowConfidence: Confidence scores are consistently low (0.05-0.10), indicating insufficient data or weak grounding signals
skills.stableRankings: Product ranking count is stable at 8 across runs, suggesting consistent catalog evaluation
skills.limitedPricing: Only 1 price recommendation per run, indicating conservative pricing adjustment strategy

anomalies.businessImpact: A sudden 30x surge in sessions versus the 30-day baseline could indicate a viral mention, paid campaign activation, competitor link, or bot/scraper activity. If genuine, it represents a rare opportunity to convert high-intent AI hardware buyers; if synthetic, it may skew analytics, inflate ad spend, and strain infrastructure without revenue benefit.
anomalies.suggestedAction: Verify traffic source in analytics (referrer, UTM, geo, device). Confirm site stability, checkout flow, and inventory levels for top AI hardware SKUs. If legitimate, amplify with retargeting and ensure customer support is staffed. If bot-driven, enable rate limiting, bot filtering (e.g., Cloudflare), and exclude from marketing attribution.

anomalies.businessImpact: A sudden 30x surge in sessions versus the 30-day baseline could indicate a viral mention, paid campaign launch, bot/scraper activity, or competitor reconnaissance. While absolute volume is low, the relative spike may strain conversion tracking accuracy and could signal either a revenue opportunity (organic interest in AI hardware) or wasted ad spend/skewed analytics if traffic is non-human.
anomalies.suggestedAction: 1) Check traffic sources in analytics (referrer, UTM, geo, device) to identify origin. 2) Inspect server logs for bot signatures or repeated IPs and apply rate limiting/WAF rules if malicious. 3) If legitimate, ensure product pages, inventory, and checkout are performing well and consider boosting ad budget on the converting channel. 4) Verify conversion funnel and add monitoring alerts for sustained elevated traffic.
